KXUSLCUPGAME-26JUL11HARWES-HAR.rules_primary: If Hartford Athletic wins the Hartford Athletic vs Westchester SC professional USL Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026 after 90 minutes plus stoppage time (does not include extra time or penalties), then the market resolves to Yes.
KXUSLCUPGAME-26JUL11HARWES-HAR.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Hartford Athletic vs Westchester SC professional USL Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026 after 90 minutes plus stoppage time (does not include extra time or penalties). If the game ends in a tie, the market called "Tie" resolves to Yes. If the game is cancelled or rescheduled to over two weeks away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules.
